## Retrieval

| Strategy | recall@3 | recall@5 | recall@10 | MRR | nDCG@5 |

*Thresholds enforced in CI: recall@5 >= 60%, MRR >= 0.30, hybrid >= vector-only, hybrid >= BM25-only.*
